name: Supply Chain Disruption
description: Dependence on global supply chains and single-source components may cause production delays

name: Semiconductor Shortage
description: Global chip shortages may limit product availability and increase component costs

name: Regulatory Compliance
description: Increasing government regulations across multiple jurisdictions may impact operations

name: Antitrust Scrutiny
description: Ongoing antitrust investigations and litigation in multiple countries

name: Data Privacy Regulation
description: Evolving data privacy laws such as GDPR and CCPA require ongoing compliance investment

name: Intense Market Competition
description: Highly competitive markets with rapidly changing technology and customer preferences

name: AI Competition
description: Rapidly evolving AI landscape with increasing competitive pressure from new entrants

name: Cybersecurity Threats
description: Increasing sophistication of cyberattacks targeting infrastructure and customer data

name: Data Breach Risk
description: Potential unauthorized access to sensitive customer and corporate data

name: Macroeconomic Conditions
description: Economic downturns or recessions may reduce consumer and enterprise spending

name: Foreign Exchange Fluctuation
description: Significant international revenue exposure creates currency translation risks

name: Interest Rate Sensitivity
description: Changes in interest rates may impact borrowing costs and investment valuations

name: Talent Acquisition
description: Intense competition for skilled engineering and technical talent

name: Climate and Sustainability
description: Increasing regulatory and stakeholder pressure on environmental sustainability

name: Geopolitical Risk
description: Trade tensions and geopolitical instability particularly related to China and Taiwan
